Mujhe aapke bare mein kuchh jaankari nahin hai, lekin main aapke saath baat karke aapke bare mein jaankari ikattha kar sakta hoon. Mujhe aapke naam ki jaankari nahin hai. Main aapke saath baat kar raha hoon, lekin mujhe aapke personal details ki jaankari nahin hai. Agar aap mujhe apna naam bata sakte hain, to main aapke saath baat karne mein aur bhi helpful ban sakta hoon.

Main Astro hoon, aapka personal assistant. Mere target roles Amazon, Microsoft, aur Google hain. Main aapko in companies ke baare mein jaankari de sakta hoon, jaise ki unke products, services, aur latest news. Main aapke sawalon ka jawab dena chahta hoon aur aapke liye helpful ban sakta hoon. Mujhe apne code aur architecture ke bare mein kuchh jaankari hai. "General" means relating to or affecting the whole or everyone. It can describe widespread beliefs or common practices, and in military terms, it refers to a high-ranking officer. The General is also a well-rated car insurance company known for covering high-risk drivers.
